title: SSLBL connector configuration
description: Imports the abuse.ch SSLBL SSL Certificate Blacklist (CC0) CSV export as wm:Indicator entities.

url.title: Feed URL
url.description: URL of the SSLBL sslblacklist.csv export (over the SSRF guard). Falls back to the pinned default feed when omitted.

limit.title: Record limit
limit.description: Optional cap on the number of indicators collected (testing / incremental runs).

auth_key.title: Auth-Key
auth_key.description: Optional abuse.ch Auth-Key (a secret; UI password field, vault-encrypted at rest), sent as the Auth-Key HTTP header. The CC0 CSV export is anonymous today; this future-proofs the connector should abuse.ch ever gate it.
